criteria.name: identifies_repetition
criteria.description: Identifies the repetition pattern across modules

criteria.name: proposes_abstraction
criteria.description: Proposes a concrete shared abstraction (trait, struct, function)

criteria.name: evaluates_cost
criteria.description: Weighs the cost of abstraction vs status quo

criteria.name: actionable_next_step
criteria.description: Proposes a concrete next step (refactor target / experiment)
